properties.Observed problems: Soil erosion of the lands on both sides of the river.
properties.Description:
Vegetative cover improving (1.5m-2.0m wide) with Areca nut seedlings @ 1.5m spacing in two rows, Beetle creeper VP @ 3m spacing in a single row, Green gram as a cover crop including applying of compost manure, NPK fertilizer and maintenance
Vegetative cover improving, replanting bamboo species and vetiver grass or riparian species at 500mm grid interval including applying of compost manure, NPK fertilizer and maintenance

properties.Observed problems: This LRC land, covering 75 acres, contains Mana grasses and experiences man-made fires approx.. once a year.
properties.Description: Vegetative cover improving with Areca nut seedling @ 1.5m spacing in a single row, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and dense planting at 500mm grid interval, applying of compost manure, NPK fertilizer, mulching with straw/ banana tree skin and maintenance
